productDisplayName: FILA Women DLS Spry Silver Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who seek aggressive traction and a supportive Fit, these DLS Spry running shoes from fila work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger.UpperHeavily meshed upper with perforations for maximum breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureCentral lacing system for a customised fitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for a snug fitPadded footbed for all day comfortBrand badge on the lateral midfootMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection OutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortShoe careWipe surface with a damp clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
